title: Star Wars Adventures in ABC

'''''Star Wars Adventures in ABC''''' was a book-and-record and book-and-cassette tape set aimed at younger readers. Each page showed a letter of the alphabet and a character, animal or vehicle whose name starts with that letter, along with a short poem about the subject. The recording featured narration from [[Anthony Daniels]] as [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and an unnamed narrator. It was produced by [[Ted Kryczko]].<ref name="Discogs" />

It was released as part of [[Buena Vista Records]]' [[Discovery Series]]. The book's back cover called it "A ''Star Wars'' Adventure in Learning Fun." Another book in this series was ''[[Star Wars Adventures in Colors and Shapes]]''.<ref name="Date" />

==Contents==
The following were the subjects of the poems:
*'''A:''' [[All Terrain Armored Transport|AT-AT]]
*'''B:''' [[Bantha]]
*'''C:''' [[C-3PO]]
*'''D:''' [[Droid]]
*'''E:''' [[Ewok]]
*'''F:''' [[The Force|Force]]
*'''G:''' [[Greedo]]
*'''H:''' [[Han Solo]]
*'''I:''' [[Stormtrooper|Imperial Stormtrooper]]
*'''J:''' [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure|Jabba the Hutt]]
*'''K:''' [[Kessel Run]]
*'''L:''' [[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian|Lando Calrissian]]
*'''M:''' [[Millennium Falcon]]
*'''N:''' [[Nien Nunb]]
*'''O:''' [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*'''P:''' [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Princess Leia]]
*'''Q:''' Quiet (of deep space)
*'''R:''' [[R2-D2]]
*'''S:''' [[Luke Skywalker|Skywalker]]
*'''T:''' [[Tauntaun]]
*'''U:''' [[Ugnaught]]
*'''V:''' [[Anakin Skywalker|Vader]]
*'''W:''' [[Wookiee]]
*'''X:''' [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighters]]
*'''Y:''' [[Yoda]]
*'''Z:''' [[Zuckuss]]

==Continuity==
The book's illustration of Greedo is based on the original [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] action figure, with its alternative outfit. As with many early sources, the Zuckuss entry is illustrated with an image of [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]].

The book has many references to Earth. For example, Ewoks are compared to [[Wikipedia:Winnie-the-Pooh_(character)|Winnie-the-Pooh]] and tauntauns to [[Wikipedia:Kangaroo|kangaroos]]. [[Wikipedia:Mexico|Mexico]], [[Wikipedia:Texas|Texas]], [[Wikipedia:Hans Christian Andersen|Hans Christian Andersen]] and the [[Wikipedia:Brothers Grimm|Brothers Grimm]] are also mentioned.
